name: siftkit
description: Windows-first shell-output compression toolkit for Codex workflows.

scripts.build: tsc -p .\tsconfig.json && tsc -p .\tsconfig.scripts.json && npm --prefix .\dashboard run build && node .\scripts\sync-dist-runtime.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:test && npx c8 --include="dist/**/*.js" --exclude="dist/src/**" --exclude="node_modules/**" --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary npx tsx --test
scripts.test:live: npm run build && powershell -Command "$env:SIFTKIT_TEST_USE_EXISTING_SERVER='1'; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/status' }; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/config' }; npx tsx --test --test-name-pattern 'concurrent oversized CLI summary requests' .\tests\runtime-cli.test.ts"
